tracks.title: 🇲🇳 Eternal Steppe | Мөнхийн Тал — Mongolian Throat Singing Khoomei | Assirem Music PROD
tracks.description:
A journey across the infinite Mongolian steppe through the ancient art of Khoomei throat singing.

Монгол хөөмэйн хөгжим — эртний уламжлалт дуу хөгжим.

Khoomei, inscribed on UNESCO's Intangible Cultural Heritage list, is a unique singing technique where a single performer produces multiple harmonics simultaneously, evoking the vast landscapes and winds of the Mongolian plains.

Accompanied by the morin khuur (horsehead fiddle), this piece honors Mongolia's deep connection between music and nature.

⏱️ Chapters:
00:00 — Dawn on the Steppe
01:20 — Khoomei Overtones
02:40 — Horsehead Fiddle
03:50 — Eternal Horizon

🎧 Perfect for: world music, meditation, nature sounds, cultural discovery

📌 Subscribe for daily AI music!

#Mongolia #ThroatSinging #Khoomei #MorinKhuur #WorldMusic #UNESCO #AssiremMusicProd #NoCopyright #MongolianMusic
